# US3 — `templates/e2e/`: context, skill overlays, tmux stubs & env files

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Epic | E3 — E2E scaffold |
| Theme | TH1 — Bootstrap Tooling |
| Status | pending |
| Size | M |

## As a…
**As a** developer scaffolding a project, **I want** the repo-local skill overlays,
copilot-instructions, tmux cockpit stubs, and env files in the template, **so that** the
scaffold cleanly hands off to `/setup-e2e-cockpit` to complete the topology (VP1 §5b,
ADR-004).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AC1: `.github/copilot-instructions.md.tmpl` exists and contains `@@APP_NAME@@`
  (plus notes on the nested-`e2e/`-git-repo topology per ADR-002).
- [ ] AC2: Seven thin overlay templates exist:
  `.github/skills/<role>/SKILL.md.tmpl` for `e2e-cockpit`, `e2e-operator`,
  `setup-e2e-cockpit`, `setup-e2e-runbook`, `worker-dev`, `worker-fix`, `worker-test`
  — each parameterised with `@@APP_NAME@@` in its header.
- [ ] AC3: `tmux-cockpit.sh` and `tmux-cockpit-local.sh` exist as **runnable
  placeholders** with annotated `# ── CONFIGURE ──` blocks, pass `bash -n`, and carry a
  `--help` (to be regenerated by `/setup-e2e-cockpit`).
- [ ] AC4: `.env.example.tmpl` exists, references `@@BACKEND_PORT@@` /
  `@@FRONTEND_PORT@@` / `@@HEALTH_PATH@@`, and `.gitignore` exists ignoring
  `.env.local` and `node_modules/`.
- [ ] AC5: No template file contains an unresolved `@@…@@` token other than the four
  sanctioned ones (`@@APP_NAME@@`, `@@BACKEND_PORT@@`, `@@FRONTEND_PORT@@`,
  `@@HEALTH_PATH@@`) — grep-auditable.

## BDD Scenarios

```gherkin
Feature: Context, overlays, tmux stubs and env

  Scenario: All seven overlay templates exist
    When  I list .github/skills/*/SKILL.md.tmpl under templates/e2e
    Then  exactly the seven harness roles are present

  Scenario: tmux placeholders are runnable shell
    When  I run "bash -n tmux-cockpit.sh" and "bash -n tmux-cockpit-local.sh"
    Then  both exit 0

  Scenario: Only sanctioned tokens appear
    When  I grep the template tree for "@@"
    Then  every hit is one of the four sanctioned tokens

  Scenario: gitignore protects local env
    Then  .gitignore lists ".env.local"
```

## Notes
- Reference: VP1 §5b (overlays, tmux placeholders), ADR-002 (nested git note in
  copilot-instructions), ADR-004 (tokens + CONFIGURE), architecture §2/§4 (pane↔overlay
  mapping).
- `MANIFEST.toml` (E3-US4) classes: `.github/copilot-instructions.md` → `framework`;
  `.github/skills/**`, `tmux-cockpit.sh`, `tmux-cockpit-local.sh`, `.env.*` → `project`;
  `.env.example`, `.gitignore` → `seed`.
- Depends on E6-US1 only insofar as the tmux stubs are shell (keep them portable); listed
  as no hard dep to keep the graph shallow — reuse the cheat-sheet if available.
- Paths under `templates/e2e/`.
